🛑
[2026/3/27 XM8 Takagi] 
If developer can not get new GUI resource, this implementation will be skipped(One voice from R&D: dev, gui, spec FO).

fields.customfield_12539: H-B13_LIGHT_AE_v1.10.01(the layout contents will be updated later, change point is adoption the new Layout from ZXE)

comments.body:
Dear all

According to spec FO([~N196312] -san), ambient light feature will be adapted in P33C {*}{color:#de350b}Nov.{color}{*}2026 SOP timeline for the first time.

!2nd_SOP_timeline.png|width=400,height=52,thumbnail!

Hello [~N208549] , [~N200911] -san

I had a talk with ZXE Akiyama-san.

I said, they had a report with CE and got some feedback, ZXE will integrate the FB and release the PSD on 24th March(Next Tuesday).

Hello [~N200911] -san
Could release the SPD to XM8 Takagi-san, once you got them?

XL2 Zhang
Reopen to discuss in PI30 PIP.

fields.customfield_12359:
GMD, Impl, Test code, GTR need to be worked on for the change in FULL_TFT_GUI_Template_sq17.xlsx
1. ProPilot-Audio-SubContents sheet:
Unify the parameter "b1" and "b2" to "b".
Change parameter "a" and "b" to a global parameter.
Impl code and relevant doc need to be updated.
2. Audio-Meta2L_w_photo-Center_wTI sheet, Audio-Photo-Side_wTI sheet, Audio-Meta3L_wo_photo-Center sheet, ProPilot-Audio-SubContents sheet:
Add Text Color
Relevant docs need to be updated synchronized and impl code to be checked.
3. Audio Meta sheet:
Add Text Color
Change text area size for "Song Title/Artist Name/Album Name/Station Name", "Frequency/Channel", "Frequency/Channel Unit" and "Preset".
Added Note for "Song Title/Artist Name/Album Name/Station Name".
Relevant docs and code need to be updated

Plan: 01.02
Impl Code: 26/04/10 (Common's test color code merge date +2, in case Common team cannot merge code by 4/7)
GMD/Test Code: 26/04/17
